chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Appln. No. 1111 of 2024. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date: Order with signature(s) of the Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ For orders as to Non-Prosecution. 05.05.2025. ************ None has appeared on behalf of the appellant and no intimation has been received. The record reflects that the instant Criminal Misc. Appln. has been pending since 2024. However no progress has been made since then. It appears that the applicant has also failed to comply with the office objection. Such fact prima facie shows that the applicant has lost interest in pursuing the instant Criminal Misc. Appln. Such fact has left this Court with no other option, except to dismiss the same for non-prosecution. Order accordingly. J U D G E Manthar Brohi
